title: Cálculo de VPIP, PFR e Estatísticas Preflop do Hero
plan: Add preflop stats SQL query methods to src/db/repository.py (VPIP, PFR, 3-Bet counts, ATS opportunities, position-grouped queries)
Implement core stat calculation methods in src/analyzers/cash.py: calculate_vpip(), calculate_pfr(), calculate_three_bet(), calculate_fold_to_three_bet(), calculate_ats()
Implement aggregation methods in CashAnalyzer: get_preflop_stats_overall(), get_preflop_stats_by_position(), get_preflop_stats_by_day(), get_preflop_stats_by_session()
Define health range thresholds and badge classification logic (green/yellow/red) for each stat
Add 'Player Stats' HTML section to src/reports/cash_report.py with stats grid, badges, and position/day breakdown tables
Add CSS styling for stat badges and health indicator colors in the report template
Create tests/test_stats.py with unit tests for all stat calculations (VPIP, PFR, 3-Bet%, Fold-to-3Bet%, ATS) including edge cases
Add integration tests verifying end-to-end flow from parsed hand data through stats calculation to HTML report output
Run full test suite and quality gates to verify no regressions
